title: Flags management page with layout and header
purpose: Displays a full page for managing flags with filtering capabilities, wrapped in layout and header components.
module_context: Exports a React functional component FlagsPage that accepts initialTab and className props, and renders a layout with header and flags view.

steps.content: Accept initialTab and className props with defaults.
Render the main layout container with provided class name.
Display the page header with title, subtitle, and breadcrumbs.
Render the flags view component inside a styled container with padding.
